mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar_id = #{avatarId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teachers (teacher_id, name, title, department, bio) VALUES (#{teacherId}, #{name}, #{title}, #{department}, #{bio})

INSERT INTO students (student_id, name, student_number, major, grade, class, department, gender) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{name}, #{studentNumber}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{clazz}, #{department}, #{gender})
